ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "good_student" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the driver is a good student */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age group of the driver (e.g., Adult, Senior) */,
  "socio_economic_status" TEXT /* Socio-economic status of the driver (e.g., UpperMiddle, Middle, Prole) */,
  "risk_aversion" TEXT /* Risk aversion level of the driver (e.g., Psychopath, Normal) */,
  "driving_skill" TEXT /* Driving skill level of the driver (e.g., Normal, Expert) */,
  "driving_history" TEXT /* Driving history of the driver (e.g., Many, Zero) */,
  "senior_training" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the driver has senior training */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "license_issue_date" TEXT /* Date the driver's license was issued */,
  "license_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the driver's license expires */,
  "driving_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of driving experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make_model" TEXT /* Make and model of the vehicle */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the vehicle (e.g., Older, Current) */,
  "mileage" TEXT /* Mileage of the vehicle (e.g., FiveThou, TwentyThou) */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., SportsCar, FamilySedan) */,
  "rugged_auto" TEXT /* Ruggedness of the vehicle (e.g., Tank, Football) */,
  "antilock" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the vehicle has an anti-lock braking system */,
  "airbag" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the vehicle has an airbag */,
  "anti_theft" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the vehicle has an anti-theft device */,
  "engine_capacity" TEXT /* Engine capacity of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Fuel type of the vehicle (e.g., Gasoline, Diesel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accidents" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver involved in the accident */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle involved in the accident */,
  "accident_type" TEXT /* Type of accident (e.g., Mild, Moderate) */,
  "accident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the accident (e.g., None, Moderate) */,
  "accident_date" TEXT /* Date of the accident */,
  "accident_location" TEXT /* Location of the accident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver holding the policy */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle covered by the policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., Liability, Comprehensive) */,
  "premium" REAL /* Premium amount of the policy */,
  "deductible" REAL /* Deductible amount of the policy */,
  "coverage_amount" REAL /* Coverage amount of the policy */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the policy becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the policy expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy against which the claim is made */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident related to the claim */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount of the claim */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy towards which the payment is made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Bank Transfer, Credit Card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "agent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "agent_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "agent_address" TEXT /* Address of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., Premium change, Coverage change) */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_history_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_vehicle" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "association_date" TEXT /* Date of association between the driver and vehicle */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the association ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id", "vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_features" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., Anti-lock braking system, Airbag) */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature (e.g., True, False) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id", "feature_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims_history" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., Status change, Amount change) */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id", "update_date")
)
